title: Granbest 5-Tier Jewellery Box with Glass Top, Large Capacity Jewellery Organiser with Drawers & Mirror, PU Leather Jewellery Storage Case for Necklaces, Earrings, Rings, Bracelets (Beige)
features: 🌈5-Tier Spacious Storage: Featuring five generously sized drawers and multiple compartments, this box caters to all your jewellery needs—from dainty necklaces, sparkling earrings, and elegant rings to even your sunglasses. Each drawer is intelligently divided to keep pieces separated and tangle-free.

🌈Premium Craftsmanship: Made with high-quality PU leather and complemented by sleek gold-tone handles, this jewellery box exudes sophistication. The plush velvet lining safeguards your delicate rings, earrings, and bracelets from damage, preserving their shine for years.

🌈Clear Glass Top & Side Mirror: The transparent glass top lets you showcase your favourite pieces and easily spot what you need. The side door with a built-in mirror adds functionality, allowing you to try on jewellery with convenience. Showcase your favourite pieces and enjoy easy jewellery try-ons with the built-in mirror.

🌈Sturdy Build & Tangle-Free Necklaces : Built to last, with a robust structure and premium materials that blend seamlessly with both contemporary and classic interiors. Dedicated hooks and compartments keep necklaces laid out neatly, so you’ll never have to waste time untangling knots again.

🌈Perfect for Gifting & Home Decor: Its chic beige hue and modern design make it a stunning addition to any bedroom or dressing table. Whether for a birthday, anniversary, or Christmas, this jewellery box is a thoughtful gift for the jewellery lovers in your life. If you have any questions, please don’t hesitate to contact us!
